jobTitle: Marketing Automation & AI Strategy Lead | Adobe Journey Optimizer Expert | AI MarTech & CRM Leader
summary:
With a foundation in film and content production (5+ years) and over 8 years of experience driving marketing automation, MarTech, and AI-powered innovation, I bring a unique blend of creativity, strategy, and technical expertise to every project. 

My journey spans founding a Laundry Startup , serving as the sole representative of India on The Apprentice: ONE Championship Edition, and being recognized as the Government of India’s Official Ambassador for the Fit India Campaign.

Currently, I lead as Marketing Automation Manager at Metro AG, specializing in Adobe Journey Optimizer (AJO) and pioneering AI-driven content pipelines and agentic AI workflows for enterprise marketing. My background as a former professional football player and entrepreneur informs my approach: dynamic, collaborative, and relentlessly focused on impact.

Key areas of expertise:
-Adobe Journey Optimizer (AJO)
-AI-Driven Marketing Automation & Content Pipelines
-Web3 Media Strategy & Startup Advisory
-Brand Strategy & Content Creation
-Enterprise MarTech Solutions

I am passionate about leveraging technology, art, and philosophy to create meaningful, human-centric marketing experiences. My work has been featured in Business Standard, India Today, and MMA India. I thrive on building innovative AI use cases, advising startups, and making a measurable difference through every role I take on.

Let’s connect if you’re interested in the future of AI-powered marketing, content innovation, Web3, or simply want to discuss transformative ideas at the intersection of technology, art, and philosophy.

headline: Building HelpingAI || Antler AIR 7 (youngest to get selected)
summary:
I am Varun Gupta. Currently working on humanising Artificial intelligence @Helpingai. I am techie by heart having 4+ years of experience in tech world. Which lead me to learning Mobile app development, Web development, Game Development, Artificial Intelligence, Machine learning and many more things. 
I with Som Jaiswal created a tech agency where we have worked across several domains and serving multiple clients. I led multiple team in appgud. At Appgud we also hosted a global hackathon where people from many country participated.
At Helpingai I worked on helpingai.co site (partial frontend + backend). I handle whole tech stuff at helpingai. I am very optimistic about future of ai and love to talk about new technology around AI. 
Let's Connect :)

positions.title: Co-Founder & CTO
positions.description:
Met my teammate in a hackathon organised by Appgud. Initially we focussed on building Emotionally Intelligent AI models for which we got more than 1m+ downloads but later down the line decided to create reasoning models which 5-10x more token and time efficient than models like deepseek-r1 and gemini-2.5-pro. 

- Created a model which got 98 EQ (highest ever recorded during November of 2024)
- Pioneered or stumbled upon a new reasoning called intermediate reasoning which made our ai model (Dhanishtha-2.0-preview) 5-10x more token and time efficient than deepseek-r1
- Solely Designed our website
- Solely created our api for our model
- Worked on our ai model with my teammate
- Pitched to top tier VCs like Antler, 3ip and lightspeed
- Got selected in Antler residency
- Solely Handled the marketing of the product and scaled our website to 3500+ concurrent users

I have also delivered corporate training programs in Data Science, Data Analytics, Cyber Security, Applied AI, Tally ERP 9, Graphic Design, Advanced Excel, Full Stack Development, AI Content Writing, and Digital Marketing and related domains.
My experience includes managing stakeholders, coordinating with clients, handling multi-center operations, and ensuring successful training outcomes.
I am passionate about skill development and creating impact through training and employment opportunities.
Currently seeking opportunities in Program Management, CSR, and Learning & Development roles.

positions.description:
I'm thrilled to announce that I have started my new position as a Data Science Intern at Wiseanalytic here in Bangalore!

I've jumped right into an exciting project focused on optimizing Accounts Receivable (AR). My role involves designing and building an end-to-end solution to predict invoice payment risk. I am currently working on developing a stacking ensemble model with LightGBM and integrating it into a full-stack Flask application with a D3.js dashboard.

I'm incredibly grateful for this opportunity and can't wait to learn and contribute. A huge thank you to the team for the warm welcome!

#NewRole #DataScience #Internship #Wiseanalytics #Bangalore #MachineLearning #Python #FinTech

positions.title: Developer Consultant
positions.description:
At Pinnacle Teleservices, I worked as a Developer Consultant in the WhatsApp API & Bulk Messaging team, where I focused on integrating and optimizing messaging solutions for businesses. My role was all about making the WhatsApp Business API more efficient—automating workflows, streamlining bulk messaging, and enhancing system performance through real-time monitoring and automation.

One of the key projects I led was building a Campaign Tracker to help businesses optimize their digital marketing efforts. I developed a URL shortening service, added analytics tracking, and integrated Redis caching, which cut server load times by 40%. Beyond that, I leveraged the system as a data scraper, allowing businesses to extract valuable marketing insights.

Overall, my work centered around building scalable, high-performance messaging solutions to ensure reliability and efficiency, even in high-volume communication environments.

headline: Making AI Data Analysts Trustworthy & Auditable through Semantic Layer | Co-Founder & CPO @ Colrows | IIT Kharagpur | Ex-Microsoft
summary:
Having led the data platforms and AI-driven transformation at global institutions, I’m now focused on solving one of the biggest challenges in enterprise AI adoption—context. At Colrows, we’re building an open, searchable, and fully autonomous Semantic Layer—the invisible infrastructure that powers copilots, agents, and intelligent workflows across the enterprise.

Our mission is to make data self-aware and continuously aligned with business meaning—so enterprises can move from manual interpretation to autonomous intelligence. Alongside this, Colrows introduces two specialized AI agents—the AI Data Analyst and AI Data Engineer—both built on the same semantic foundation to accelerate analytics, automation, and AI adoption across organizations.

I’m passionate about shaping the next era of enterprise AI—where every decision, workflow, and insight is powered by understanding, not just data.

positions.title: Co-Founder, Chief Product Officer
positions.description: At the core of Colrows is an open, searchable, and fully autonomous Semantic Layer—the invisible infrastructure that powers AI agents, copilots, and intelligent workflows across the enterprise. Continuously learning from data, metadata, and business context, it becomes the single source of truth that bridges human intent and enterprise systems. This foundation accelerates AI adoption by making organizational knowledge instantly accessible and actionable. Built on the same semantic core, Colrows introduces two specialized AI agents—the AI Data Analyst, who transforms natural language into insights and visualizations, and the AI Data Engineer, who automates data transformations and pipeline design. Together, they enable enterprises to operate with a self-evolving data intelligence layer that fuels every AI-driven initiative.

positions.title: Global Head Data Distribution
positions.description:
As Global Lead at MSCI, I led the end-to-end strategy and execution of index universe data distribution across multiple channels including REST APIs, file systems, and Snowflake — powering critical financial data delivery to global clients.

I managed a 60-engineer team focused on scale, performance, and reliability. One of my key accomplishments was building MSCI’s next-gen index data search platform using Cassandra — enabling complex queries over 600TB of data with sub-second response times for both internal users and external clients.

I also drove the full-scale migration of hundreds of services to Microsoft Azure, transforming the platform to a modern cloud-native architecture using Kubernetes and Rancher — significantly improving system resilience and operational efficiency.

🔹 Led global engineering team (60+ members) across data engineering, DevOps, and platform services
🔹 Built distributed search platform handling massive-scale data (600TB+) with millisecond query times
🔹 Delivered cloud migration for entire system into Azure, adopting Kubernetes and Rancher for orchestration
🔹 Enabled seamless delivery of financial data via APIs, Snowflake, and file-based channels

Tech Stack: Azure | Kubernetes | Rancher | Cassandra | REST APIs | Snowflake | Microservices | Distributed Systems

positions.title: Senior Vice President
positions.description:
Led engineering for BNY Mellon’s Enterprise Data Platform—an ambitious, firm-wide initiative to build a centralized, highly available, and hyper-scalable data lake powering data-driven decision-making across the organization.

I oversaw a global team of 65+ technologists, including developers, DevOps, and QA professionals, driving platform architecture, execution, and operational excellence. We engineered the platform to handle diverse data formats and transport types, scaling to process over 2 billion events per day across thousands of VMs, physical servers, and containers.

Key responsibilities:

Chief Architect for the platform’s design and evolution
Building a unified, cross-functional team culture across geographies
Standardizing engineering best practices and operating models
Managing stakeholders, vendors, budgets, and tech procurement
Championing data governance, quality, access control, and lineage

🏆 Achievements:

Winner of the TDWI Best Practices Award (2021) in Data Management
Designed and implemented a Failover & Stay (FoS) strategy ensuring uninterrupted platform operation during data centre outages
Migrated a large VM fleet to over 3,000 Docker containers
Developed a custom SFTP-integrated file system based on Amazon S3

positions.title: Co-founder & CTO
positions.description:
As Co-founder and CTO of Stratawiz, I led the end-to-end design, architecture, and product strategy. I successfully launched a global B2B SaaS platform and scaled it to onboard 100,000+ users across various enterprises, including Fortune 500 companies.

Starting as a solo founder, I grew the engineering team to 95 members and established the entire technology organization—defining the operating model, processes, financial planning, and more.

In true startup fashion, we navigated multiple cloud providers before ultimately standardizing on AWS. I also built key operational frameworks, including change management, DevOps, QA, defect tracking, and customer success systems.

positions.title: Assistant Vice President
positions.description: Led a team in developing a data ingestion system capable of handling internet-scale volumes, leveraging a suite of open-source distributed processing and analytics tools such as Apache Storm, Spark, PrestoDB, and Cassandra.

positions.title: Assistant Vice President
positions.description:
Designed and developed many features/services for a cross-asset trading platform. The platform used FpML based data model and an event centric model allowed for flexible ticketing and high data quality as well as consistent user experience across Cash and flow derivatives. The platform used micro-service based architecture with TIBCO EMS and Gemfire cache. Some of my major work included- 
Built support for Credit Derivatives (CDS, CDX/iTraxx, Tranches, CDS on CDO, ABS CDS)
Support for Flow Rates (Vanilla Swaps, FRA, OIS, Basis, Swap Spread, Xccy Swaps)
Flexible quick-entry ticketing for Sales and Trading
Exception based workflow for Middle Office
Full integration with Affirmations (ICELink, Markitwire, BBG VCON)
Full STP with the Back-Office

positions.title: Solutions Architect
positions.description:
As a Solution Architect at Capgemini, I was responsible for designing and delivering end-to-end technical solutions tailored to client needs across various industries. I collaborated with business stakeholders, technical teams, and project managers to translate business requirements into scalable, secure, and cost-effective architectures.

Key Responsibilities and Achievements:

Designed comprehensive solution architectures for enterprise applications, ensuring alignment with client objectives, technology standards, and industry best practices.

Led technical discovery sessions with clients to gather and analyze requirements, and developed architecture blueprints, technical roadmaps, and high-level design documents.

Worked closely with cross-functional teams — including development, infrastructure, security, and operations — to drive solution implementation from concept to deployment.

Evaluated and recommended technologies, tools, and frameworks based on project requirements, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

Conducted architectural reviews, identified technical risks early, and developed mitigation strategies to ensure project success.

Supported pre-sales activities by providing technical expertise, preparing proposals, and presenting solutions to prospective clients.

Actively engaged in governance processes, ensuring adherence to architectural standards and reviewing project milestones.

Mentored junior architects and developers, promoting best practices in software design, cloud adoption, security, and performance optimization.

Championed Agile and DevOps practices to enable faster delivery cycles, improve collaboration, and enhance solution quality.

Designed and implemented scalable, maintainable, and high-performance solutions aligned with product requirements and architectural guidelines.

Mentored and guided a team of developers, establishing coding best practices, conducting regular code reviews, and fostering a culture of continuous improvement.

headline: Head of Engineering | Building Scalable Healthcare Products | Stanford LEAD | AWS Solution Architect
summary:
Raghvendra is a senior engineering leader with a wealth of experience in software design and development. His diverse background spans product, startups, and consulting, with expertise across the entire tech spectrum—think Server, Database, Web, Mobile, Cloud, BI, and UI/UX.

He has a knack for guiding teams to achieve impressive results while helping organizations increase revenue and reduce costs.

Raghvendra champions a growth mindset and is a lifelong learner, having successfully completed many online courses.

Just like Palmist predicts the future by reading hand, Raghvendra can accurately predict the Earth's position around the sun when the fully functional, battle tested, legally compliant software will be available, from one line of requirement. And don’t worry; he won’t charge extra for app store approval time!

When he’s not working his magic, Raghvendra enjoys diving into books, listening to classic Hindi songs, and playing table tennis. In fact, he was the winner of the Best Player award in the category of Right-Handed Android Software Engineers on his team back in 2014.

His favorite quote: Underperformance and friction are natural states of organizations. Everything else requires leadership.
His motto: Be curious, not judgemental
His favourite place on earth: Production

Do you want to increase revenue and reduce cost for your organization? Let's connect.

headline: SDE @Oasiz | Founding Engineer @RiveraLabs | Full Stack Blockchain Developer | 4x Hackathon Winner 🏆 | Building Aggressively.
summary:
I’m a passionate Full Stack & Blockchain Developer, dedicated to building decentralized and web-based solutions that are fast, secure, and built for real-world impact. I love turning ideas into meaningful products through clean architecture, smart contract engineering, and intuitive user experiences.

🔹 Blockchain Side:
I work across multiple ecosystems including Solana (Rust), Ethereum (Solidity), Aptos (Move), Casper, Stellar, and more. My experience spans smart contract development, program architecture, and building trustless, user-friendly DApps. Some of my blockchain projects include EscrowX, decentralized marketplaces, Web3 authentication systems, and various on-chain tools focused on transparency, efficiency, and security. I’m actively exploring multi-chain interoperability, DeFi mechanisms, and scalable contract architecture.

🔹 Full Stack Side:
I develop full-stack applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Tailwind CSS, crafting responsive interfaces and smooth end-to-end workflows. My work includes AI-powered chat systems, course-selling APIs, Farm-Stack (a supply-chain transparency app), and several modern web apps that emphasize clean UI/UX, reliability, and performance.

I’m continually building, experimenting, and contributing to open-source and collaborative projects. I’m always excited to connect with other builders, collaborate on innovative ideas, and contribute to the full-stack and Web3 communities.

educations.schoolName: Trinity College of Engineering and Research

projects.title: Financial Document Analyzer – AI Multi-Agent Platform
projects.description:
A production-ready AI platform that analyzes financial documents using a CrewAI multi-agent architecture. The system allows users to upload PDFs, run background processing jobs, track task progress, and receive AI-generated market insights.
The backend is built using FastAPI with Celery + Redis for asynchronous task queues and PostgreSQL for persistent storage.
The frontend is built in React (Vite) + Tailwind, featuring a clean dashboard, file upload module, job tracking, and results viewer.
The multi-agent pipeline uses CrewAI agents for tasks such as text extraction, market research, risk evaluation, and investment recommendations.
The aim of this project is to integrate GenAI into real-world financial workflows and provide a scalable architecture for heavy AI workloads.

projects.title: Franz Co – Corporate Web Platform
projects.description:
A high-performance corporate web platform built for a real client. The system is designed to handle 10,000+ monthly visitors with optimized SEO, responsive layouts, and modern UI/UX.
I built the frontend in React and improved performance using code splitting, image compression, and advanced caching. The site achieved 95+ Google PageSpeed on both mobile and desktop.
Included dynamic CMS support through API-driven content, enabling non-technical users to update pages easily and reduce update time by 70%.
This project represents my ability to build professional, production-grade React applications with attention to performance and end-user experience

headline: Head of Engineering | Building Scalable Healthcare Products | Stanford LEAD | AWS Solution Architect
summary:
Raghvendra is a senior engineering leader with a wealth of experience in software design and development. His diverse background spans product, startups, and consulting, with expertise across the entire tech spectrum—think Server, Database, Web, Mobile, Cloud, BI, and UI/UX.

He has a knack for guiding teams to achieve impressive results while helping organizations increase revenue and reduce costs.

Raghvendra champions a growth mindset and is a lifelong learner, having successfully completed many online courses.

Just like Palmist predicts the future by reading hand, Raghvendra can accurately predict the Earth's position around the sun when the fully functional, battle tested, legally compliant software will be available, from one line of requirement. And don’t worry; he won’t charge extra for app store approval time!

When he’s not working his magic, Raghvendra enjoys diving into books, listening to classic Hindi songs, and playing table tennis. In fact, he was the winner of the Best Player award in the category of Right-Handed Android Software Engineers on his team back in 2014.

His favorite quote: Underperformance and friction are natural states of organizations. Everything else requires leadership.
His motto: Be curious, not judgemental
His favourite place on earth: Production

Do you want to increase revenue and reduce cost for your organization? Let's connect.
